title: 5 Stocks to Buy as Markets Head Toward Worst 1H in 50 Years

title: Hershey, Nestle, Cargill win dismissal in U.S. of child slavery lawsuit
text: A federal judge in Washington, D.C. on Tuesday dismissed a lawsuit by eight citizens of Mali who sought to hold Hershey Co, Nestle SA, Cargill Inc and others liable for child slavery on Ivory Coast cocoa farms.

title: The Hershey Company Donates Hershey Theatre to The M.S. Hershey Foundation

title: 7 Long-Term Stocks That Never Go Out of Style
text: As the near-term remains rocky, it's time to consider adding these seven long-term stocks to your portfolio. The post 7 Long-Term Stocks That Never Go Out of Style appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Hershey (HSY) Benefits From Pricing, Buyouts & Hurt by Costs
text: Hershey (HSY) has been gaining on its pricing power and contributions from buyouts like Pretzels, Dot's and Lily's. However, elevated costs and supply-chain inflation are headwinds.
